title: The next era of AI coding
summary: Michael Truell discusses the shift from manual software development to AI-assisted and autonomous agent-driven coding. He cites data showing 30% of Cursor PRs are fully agent-developed, enterprise code went from 15% to 75% AI-generated in a year, and engineers increasingly manage agents rather than write code directly.
